title: Pluto - IoT Device for Farmers
description: Low-cost Agri-tech device to remotely control water pumps, helping farmers manage irrigation
details:
// Pluto.click - Founder & CEO

# Pluto: Smart Irrigation Control

A revolutionary IoT device that enables farmers to remotely control water pumps from anywhere using just a phone call.

## The Problem
Farmers in rural India faced irregular power supply and had to physically be present to switch water pumps on/off, often in the middle of the night.

## The Solution
Pluto allows farmers to:
- Control submersible/water pumps remotely via phone call
- Get notifications when power is restored
- Manage irrigation from any corner of the world
- Save time and physical labor

## Technical Implementation
- Prototyped using Arduino microcontrollers
- Programmed in Embedded C
- Handles current up to 25 amp
- Uses GSM module for phone connectivity
- Patent filed and granted

## Impact
- Sold 700+ units across 5 Indian states
- Impacted 500+ farmers directly
- Won ASSOCHAM Water Management Excellence Award 2018
- Selected as Ashoka Youth Venturer (April 2018)
- Featured on Doordarshan and Apna Radio

## Recognition
- Ashoka Youth Venturer (Top 16 young changemakers in India)
- ASSOCHAM Best Innovative Water Technology in Agriculture
- CYBERCON 2018 Technology Excellence Award
- Award presented by Union Minister Nitin Gadkari

## Links
- Website: https://www.pluto.click/

- Status: Successfully exited after 5 years
